meta.title: The Sanctuary | Exhibition Booth Build | Construction Portfolio
meta.description: Case study of The Sanctuary, an exhibition booth build focused on curved architectural forms, premium finishes, and coordinated on-site execution.
meta.ogDescription: From wood framing and MDF cladding to finish-ready detailing, The Sanctuary booth highlights disciplined execution for trade show environments.

hero.title: The Sanctuary
hero.summary: The Sanctuary translated a concept-driven booth into a premium visitor environment, delivered through controlled execution, finish precision, and coordinated site operations.

overview.title: Overview
overview.body: Developed for a high-traffic event setting, The Sanctuary required a build strategy that balanced visual impact with installation reliability. The scope covered structural framing, curved and flat MDF substrate delivery, finish-ready detailing, and interface coordination with electrical and lighting teams to support opening-day readiness.

scope.label: Scope
scope.value: Wood frame structure, MDF cladding for flat and curved surfaces, finish-ready detailing, lighting/electrical interface checks, and on-site installation support.

challengeApproach.title: Challenge & Approach
challengeApproach.constraints: Primary constraints included compressed move-in windows, tight tolerance control across curved geometries, and multi-trade overlap during critical close-up stages.
challengeApproach.approach: The team applied phased sequencing, daily field alignment, and milestone-based quality controls to maintain geometry accuracy, keep MEP interfaces ready before closure, and deliver a consistent finish standard. The final outcome was an immersive booth delivered on schedule with reliable fit-up and presentation quality.

highlights.title: Highlights
items: Executed a complete wood frame and MDF substrate package for both planar and curved architectural surfaces.
Maintained clean reveals and controlled joint lines to support premium finishing requirements.
Coordinated electrical and lighting touchpoints before final closure to reduce rework risk.
Achieved on-time handover with stable quality across installation, detailing, and final presentation.

credits.title: Credits
credits.body: Construction execution and site coordination by the Construction Portfolio team, in collaboration with client-appointed design and finishing partners.

cta.title: Need a similar execution on your project?
cta.body: Let’s review your scope, constraints, and timeline requirements.
